title: Smart Charging Station Mobile App
summary: Built a mobile-first application letting businesses offer smart phone-charging stations as a customer amenity, with IoT-enabled backend management and networked scalability across venues like hospitality, retail, and entertainment locations.
quote: The simplest of services can add significant value through a technologically-driven application.
results: Gave businesses a value-added customer convenience that encourages longer visits.
Created a modern, distinctive amenity that improves brand perception.
Enabled IoT-based remote management and scalability across multiple locations.
